Hi. This is a follow-up to my comment #3. On my previous RX 560 GPU, crashes happened frequently and it was a very unstable experience. After replacing the GPU with RX 6400 about a month ago, during this time I only had one crash, while browsing in Firefox. I'm attaching the dump. Thanks to everyone who's looking into this, I'm only capable of reporting.
